ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., Civilization, Starcraft) */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., single-player, multi-player) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the game (e.g., strategy, action) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* The name of the game developer */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* The name of the game publisher */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the game */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's cover image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is currently active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the outcome belongs to */,
  "civilization" TEXT /* Civilization of the player */,
  "adversary" TEXT /* Adversary civilization */,
  "civilization_winrate" REAL /* Win rate of the player's civilization */,
  "adversary_winrate" REAL /* Win rate of the adversary civilization */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the player who played the game */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* The date when the match was played */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the match in minutes */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* The name of the map where the game was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* The type of match (e.g., ranked, casual) */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* The version of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* The result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* The score of the player */,
  "adversary_score" INTEGER /* The score of the adversary */,
  "strategy_used" TEXT /* The strategy used by the player */,
  "strategy_effectiveness" REAL /* The effectiveness of the strategy used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, game developer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the tournament is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* The total prize pool of the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user organizing the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the tournament (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration for the tournament is open */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tournament */,
  "rules" TEXT /* The rules of the tournament */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's banner image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tournaments" (
  "user_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user tournament record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the user registered for the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user's participation (e.g., registered, playing, eliminated, winner) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* The rank of the user in the tournament */,
  "points" INTEGER /* The points earned by the user in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tournaments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
